description: A deterministic policy module resolves a Grounding Pack Runtime Record at .excn/runtime/grounding-pack.json with no model call — schema digest, glossary terms, ADR index, CLI stamp, and a UUIDv7 pool — exposed as a new warm Scaffolder verb runnable by hand and by the hook.
title: Grounding Pack regenerator and the warm verb
acceptance_criteria: node src/bin/cli.js warm writes .excn/runtime/grounding-pack.json and exits 0
Identical inputs produce a byte-identical pack — all object keys sorted before serialization
The schema digest records the notes field type per-schema: prd.schema.json's array shape distinct from the string shape in the issue and sprint schemas
The pack carries a non-empty UUIDv7 pool, the CONTEXT.md glossary terms, and the ADR index (id + title + status)
A node --test unit asserts determinism and per-schema notes correctness
